scope: new research branch after G5 closed M1j; one training seed, one fixed final checkpoint, and one fresh K=8 dev blind pilot; no formal validation, test, multi-seed expansion, or reuse of G3-G5 diagnostic seeds
scientific_question: can a token-specific causal Transformer query retrieve the correct archival context from the same history without a global event-level transport scalar, oracle context input, new memory slots, or second fast weights
research_reset: M1k is not an M1j repair and does not alter the frozen M1j stop decision or formal M1b status
source_conversion: parameter-free M1f with covariance-corrected content HPC ridge 0.001

architecture.name: token-specific query-conditioned archival context readout
architecture.query_key_input: causal Transformer pfc_hidden concatenated with action-only persistent state and causal cyclic action signature
architecture.history_event_mask: strictly earlier balanced-action structural proposals only; current and future tokens are masked
architecture.history_value: frozen M1b context_head(base state) at each earlier proposal; values are episode-local activations, not parameters or slots
architecture.read_gate: 16-dimensional token-specific sigmoid gate interpolating each context channel between frozen M1f source context and attended archival context
architecture.disabled_path: gate exactly zero, reproducing frozen M1f context and prediction

allowed: sensory observations strictly before current token through causal Transformer hidden
earlier proposal activations and archival base contexts from the same episode
forbidden_model_inputs: query, clean, conflict, return, switch, or correctness masks

checkpoint_selection: none; fixed final step 600 is the only blind candidate
trainable_scope: query projection, key projection, read-gate norm, and read-gate MLP only; all pretrained PFC, state, context head, EC, place, address, content HPC, fusion, and decoder tensors frozen
loss: one unweighted all-token sensory cross-entropy only
forbidden_losses: query, return, conflict, or event reweighting
post_result_rule: open blind seed427151 exactly once after fixed step600; all five scientific gates and every implementation gate must pass before any multi-seed expansion; otherwise stop M1k without tuning on train monitor or blind outputs
